title: Alvaro Cardoso
text: Home * People * Alvaro Cardoso Alvaro Jose Povoa Cardoso , a Portuguese checkers programmer, and author of the Portuguese checkers (Spanish checkers, classical checkers, Jogo de Damas Clássicas [1] ) engine Profound , initially written in Powerbasic 2.1 augmented with many assembly instructions [2] , considered as one of the strongest classical checkers engines [3] [4] . Alvaro is long term member in CCC . Contents 1 Forum Posts 1.1 2000 ... 1.2 2005 ... 1.3 2010 ... 1.4 2015 ... 2 External Links 3 References Forum Posts [ edit ] 2000 ...
